name: AtkinsRéalis
content: AtkinsRéalis (formerly SNC-Lavalin) is a global professional services and project management company and a leader in nuclear engineering. The company provides full-lifecycle services for nuclear power plants, including design, construction, maintenance, and decommissioning. As the steward of CANDU reactor technology, AtkinsRéalis is a critical player in the global nuclear supply chain, benefiting from the renewed interest in large-scale nuclear projects and the rehabilitation of nuclear infrastructure in allied markets.
